products.name: WhatsApp Marketing Platform
products.summary: Enterprise-grade high-volume business messaging automation engine.
products.description: A robust, high-performance messaging automation platform integrated directly with the official WhatsApp Business API, supporting broadcasts, multi-agent desks, and conversion tracking.
capabilities: Official WhatsApp API integration and template management
Multi-agent collaborative team inbox with role routing
Automated chat broadcasts and customer sequence triggers
benefits: Boost message read rates up to 98% compared to standard email templates
Automate up to 75% of baseline support inquiries with logic agents

products.name: Influencer Marketing Platform
products.summary: Automated campaign execution and creator relationship platform.
products.description: An end-to-end influencer analytics and coordination system that streamlines creator discovery, contract management, campaign tracking, and ROI analytics.
capabilities: Advanced creator analytics and audience demographic verification
Automated contract generation and payout tracking pipelines
Real-time ROI dashboard mapping metrics across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube
benefits: Reduce creator discovery overhead by up to 60% using database filters
Verify creator metrics instantly before committing budget

services.name: Data Engineering
services.summary: Robust, high-throughput cloud infrastructure and analytics data architectures.
services.description: Custom delivery and architecture modeling for enterprise data warehouses, real-time analytics data pipelines, and automated ETL/ELT workflows.
capabilities: Real-time streaming pipeline engineering (Kafka, Flink, Spark Streaming)
Enterprise data warehousing and data lake construction (BigQuery, Snowflake)
Automated pipeline orchestrations and data form modeling (dbt, Airflow)
benefits: Reduce analytical query overhead by 40% using optimized partitioning
Ensure pipeline ingestion latency of under 5 seconds for critical analytics

services.name: Enterprise & Agentic AI
services.summary: Advanced AI automation and customized LLM architectures for enterprise workflows.
services.description: Integration and development of custom large language model pipelines, multi-agent automated task suites, vector search indexing, and fine-tuning deployment pipelines.
capabilities: Custom LLM fine-tuning and domain adaptation training workflows
Multi-agent autonomous coordination frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI)
High-precision vector retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) implementation
benefits: Automate complex multi-step analysis tasks from hours to seconds
Achieve up to 99% accuracy on structured company retrieval queries

services.name: AI Strategy & Advisory
services.summary: Executive advisory and technological feasibility roadmaps for AI transformation.
services.description: High-level consulting services guiding enterprises through AI capability audits, business case prioritization, and complete AI governance policies.
capabilities: Comprehensive AI capability audits and technical readiness reviews
AI ROI calculations and strategic use case prioritization frameworks
benefits: Avoid costly engineering missteps on unfeasible AI applications
Establish a concrete, phased roadmap matching capital allocations

services.name: AI-Powered Marketing

capabilities: AI-accelerated content production, copy auditing, and branding strategy

Automated search engine optimization (SEO) monitoring
benefits: Increase content throughput by 4x without sacrificing brand alignment
Improve PPC return-on-ad-spend (ROAS) by up to 35% via dynamic bid adjustments
